motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
```python
class Solution:
    def lastSubstring(self, s: str) -> str:
        n = len(s)
        i, j, k = 0, 1, 0
        while j + k < n:
            if s[i + k] == s[j + k]:
                k += 1
            elif s[i + k] < s[j + k]:
                i = max(i + k + 1, j)
                j = j + 1 if i != j else j + k + 1
                k = 0
            else:
                j = j + k + 1
                k = 0
        return s[i:]
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
explanation: The solution uses a two-pointer technique to track the starting indices of the potential maximum substrings. It compares characters at corresponding positions and adjusts the pointers accordingly, ensuring a linear time complexity.
